result.diagram_code:
sequenceDiagram
participant PV as ProVerif
participant F as model.pv
PV->>F: Parse input file
F-->>PV: Syntax error at line 138, chars 15-17
PV-->>PV: Abort before verifying queries
result.explanation: What goes wrong is a parse failure, not a protocol-level attack. ProVerif reports `Error: Syntax error` at line 138, characters 15-17, so the model cannot be parsed and none of the secrecy or authentication queries are actually checked.
result.notes: The supplied evidence only proves a syntax error at line 138, chars 15-17; it does not provide a successful parse or any execution trace. The file also contains visibly corrupted text later in a comment near the server-launch block, but the given log does not directly attribute the reported error to that later region.
